10.4 If a party seeks to cite an authority, then a copy of, or link to, it must be provided in advance of a hearing to any litigant in person.

## Chapter 11: Format of the bundle: e-bundles


11.1 This Chapter is subject to any case-specific direction of the court.


11.2 The following requirements apply to e-bundles for all types of proceedings-
